qwen3.verdict: STILL_STUCK_ON_THINKING — Content-Length fix (CL:0 → {{BODY_INNER_LENGTH}}) did NOT resolve the warning rendering issue. User still sees perpetual '생각 중...' spinner with no warning message. The SSE response body is still not being processed by the browser. Possible causes: (1) template not reloaded on this Etap instance, (2) qwen3_sse response type needs different Content-Length handling, (3) browser SSE EventSource ignores body regardless of Content-Length.
